description:
Add single proxy or proxy list.


To add single proxy use this parameters:


+ **proxy_ip** (required) - proxy ip or host
+ **proxy_port** (required) - proxy port
+ **proxy_user** (optional) - proxy username
+ **proxy_pass** (optional) - proxy password

To add proxy list use this parameters:


+ **proxy_row** (required) - proxy list in String format ip:port:user:pass. Each proxy must be start with new line (use \n separator)

bodyParams.name: proxy_ip
bodyParams.description: Proxy ip or host. Required if **proxy_row** is not specified.

bodyParams.name: proxy_port
bodyParams.description: Proxy port. Required if **proxy_row** is not specified.

bodyParams.name: proxy_user
bodyParams.description: Proxy username. Required if **proxy_row** is not specified.

bodyParams.name: proxy_pass
bodyParams.description: Proxy password. Required if **proxy_row** is not specified.

bodyParams.name: proxy_row
bodyParams.description: Proxy list in String format ip:port:user:pass. Each proxy must be start with new line (use \r\n separator)
